title: TerminalAssetAddRequest
description: Request body for adding a new asset via the Terminal API's /terminal/assets endpoint.

asset_id.description: The unique identifier for the asset.

name.description: The human-readable name of the asset.

capacity_kw.description: The capacity of the asset in kilowatts.

components.description: A list of components that make up the asset.

model.description: The model number of the component.

serial.description: The serial number of the component.
